title: TSK-0154: Introduce IBuildGoal marker interface (replace fragile type-check)
description:
## Background
Multiple places in the codebase use `goal is BuildGoal` type-checks to determine if a goal is a build goal. This is fragile because:
- `BuildGoalDecomposer.CanHandle` uses `goal is BuildGoal`
- `HtnPlanner.PlanAsync` uses `goal is BuildGoal`
- Various recovery/governor paths check for build-specific behavior

## Proposed Interface
```csharp
public interface IBuildGoal : IGoal
{
    Blueprint Blueprint { get; }
    IReadOnlyList<PlacementBlock> Blocks { get; }
    BuildOrigin? Origin { get; }
    bool HasExplicitOrigin { get; }
}
```

## Implementation
1. Make `BuildGoal` implement `IBuildGoal`
2. Update `BuildGoalDecomposer.CanHandle` to `goal is IBuildGoal`
3. Update `HtnPlanner.PlanAsync` type-check
4. Search codebase for all `is BuildGoal` checks and update

## Files
- New: `Agent.Planning/Goals/IBuildGoal.cs`
- Modified: `Agent.Planning/Goals/BuildGoal.cs`
- Modified: `Agent.Planning/Decomposition/BuildGoalDecomposer.cs`
- Modified: `Agent.Planning/HtnPlanner.cs`
- Any other files with `is BuildGoal` checks
